Description: Hamburger menus on desktop hide critical navigation.
Do: Use a visible sidebar or top navigation.
Don't: Hide all links behind a hamburger icon.

Description: Text color is too similar to background color.
Don't: Use grey text on white backgrounds.

Description: Large images slow down the perceived load time.
Don't: Lazy load the main hero image.

Description: Buttons don't change on hover or click.
Placeholders used as labels disappear on typing.
